mapper.select: /*GiftVocMapper.getGiftVocDtl*/ SELECT A.GIFT_VOC_SEQ AS giftVocSeq , A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , B.SUB_LINK_NAME AS subLinkName , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo , B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS lstComActvDate , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(C.REQ_IN_DAY,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS reqInDay , C.FST_RATE_NM AS fstRateNm , C.LST_RATE_NM AS lstRateNm , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', B.SUB_STATUS) AS subStatus , C.RECOMMEND_INFO AS recommendInfo , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', C.ON_OFF_TYPE) AS onOffType , C.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER AS openMarketReferer , A.CUST_NM AS custNm , A.PROM_NM AS promNm , A.GIFT_TYPE AS giftType , A.GIFT_AMT AS giftAmt , A.VOC_STAT AS vocStat , A.VOC_CTN AS vocCtn , A.DIVISN AS divisn , A.RMK AS rmk , A.VOC_MNG_ORGN AS vocMngOrgn , A.VOC_TYPE AS vocType , A.VOC_REQ_DT AS vocReqDt , A.USER_ID AS userId , A.RECOMM_ID AS recommId , A.RECOMM_CONTRACT_NUM AS recommContractNum , DECODE(A.EXTNL_ORGN_REF_YN, 'Y', '1', '0') AS extnlOrgnRefYn , A.VOC_DESC AS vocDesc , A.ANS_RMK AS ansRmk , A.ANS_PAY_RSN AS ansPayRsn , A.ANS_PAY_ITEM AS ansPayItem , A.ANS_PAY_AMT AS ansPayAmt , A.ANS_PAY_PLAN_MON AS ansPayPlanMon , A.ANS_STAT AS ansStat FROM MSP_GIFT_VOC_MGMT A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_REQUEST_DTL C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.GIFT_VOC_SEQ = #{giftVocSeq}

/*GiftVocMapper.getCustInfo*/ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS subLinkName , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lstComActvDate , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.REQ_IN_DAY,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS reqInDay , B.FST_RATE_NM AS fstRateNm , B.LST_RATE_NM AS lstRateNm , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', A.SUB_STATUS) AS subStatus , B.RECOMMEND_INFO AS recommendInfo , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', B.ON_OFF_TYPE) AS onOffType , B.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER AS openMarketReferer FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST_DTL B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
